title: 21:07 â March 18, 2021
body_text:
21:07 â March 18, 2021
Update to Bill Payment Remittance Processing (BPRP) Documentation
We updated the Bill Payment Remittance Processing (BPRP) Part to include procedures for credit unions in provinces outside of BC and Ontario. Where applicable, Chapters or Sections that only apply to BC and Ontario credit unions and other Central 1 clients are clearly identified and financial institutions are advised to contact their provincial central for related information.
We also updated additional BPRP forms.
Bill Payments Volume
Bill Payment Remittance Processing (BPRP) Part
Section 1.1, Overview of Bill Payment Remittance Processing (BPRP)
We updated and reorganized the product overview and specified the services applicable to BC and Ontario Credit Unions and other Central 1 clients.
Section 1.2, BPRP Fees and Agreements
We added a new Section instructing financial institutions where to obtain information on fees, including fees charged by other financial institutions.
Section 1.4, BPRP Document Library
We added a new form â Letter of Direction â Bill Payment Remittance Processing Cancellation, Form 9310.
Section 2.1, Definitions
We added a definition for Restricted Entity.
Section 3.2, CPA Rules
We clarified that a separate corporate creditor agreement can be signed per remittance or a single corporate creditor agreement can be signed for multiple remittance types, provided each remittance type has a separate Corporate Creditor Identification Number (CCIN).
Section 3.3, Restricted Entities
We added a new Section related to Restricted Entities.
Section 4.1, Policy on Enrolling Business Members in BPRP
We added identifying Restricted Entities to the list of financial institution considerations when establishing BPRP policies.
Section 4.2, Policy on Internal Controls and Secure Site and FTP User Management
We added a note that this Section applies to credit unions in BC and Ontario and other Central 1 clients using the File and Report Exchange for BPRP reports and data files.
Chapter 5, Signing a Bill Payment Remittance Processing Agreement
We added a new Chapter that lists the Bill Payment Remittance Processing Agreement signing requirements.
Section 6.1, Overview of Enrolling in BPRP
We segregated the BPRP enrollment steps that apply to all financial institutions from those that apply only to BC and Ontario credit unions and other Central 1 clients.
We added a note advising financial institutions in other provinces to contact their provincial central for additional information on reports and data file availability.
Section 6.2, Enrollment Checklist for BPRP
We added a note that BC and Ontario credit unions and other Central 1 clients can use the checklist to assess corporate creditor enrollment requirements.
We added a note advising financial institutions in other provinces to contact their provincial central for enrollment requirements.
Section 6.4, Completing the Application for Bill Payment Remittance Processing
We updated the BPRP application and completion instructions.
Section 6.6, Obtaining a Letter of Direction â Bill Payment Remittance Processing
We updated the letter of direction and added a reference to the new letter of direction â Letter of Direction â Bill Payment Remittance Processing Cancellation, Form 9310.
Section 6.7, Accessing Central 1âs File and Report Exchange
We added a note that this Section applies only to BC and ON credit unions and other Central 1 clients.
Section 7.1, Sending BPRP Service Requests
We added instructions that non-Central 1 financial institutions send BPRP requests and all supporting documents to their provincial central.
Section 8.1, Modifying a BPRP Arrangement
We added instructions for non-Central 1 clients to modify a BPRP arrangement, reorganized the content, and updated the form image.
Section 8.2, Cancelling a BPRP Arrangement
We updated the instructions for cancelling a BPRP arrangement, including the addition of a new form â Letter of Direction â Bill Payment Remittance Processing Cancellation, Form 9310.
Chapter 9, BPRP Settlement and Tracing
We added a note that the Chapter applies only to BC and ON credit unions and other Central 1 clients.
We added a note advising financial institutions in other provinces to contact their provincial central for information on Bill Payment Remittance Processing (BPRP) settlement and tracing.
We clarified the wording on monthly fees.
Chapter 10, BPRP Reports
We added a note that the Chapter applies only to BC and ON credit unions and other Central 1 clients.
We added a note advising financial institutions in other provinces to contact their provincial central for information on BPRP reports.
Chapter 11, BPRP Data Files
We added a note that the Chapter only applies to BC and ON credit unions and other Central 1 clients.
We added a note advising financial institutions in other provinces to contact their provincial central for information on data file availability.
